title: BEM-883 registry validation
objective:
Run script:
"""
Path('governance/tools').mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
Path('governance/reports').mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
Path('governance/runtime/curator_dispatch').mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
Path('governance/state').mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)

schemas = {
  'architecture_registry': {'path':'governance/state/architecture_registry.json','required':['status','managing_contour','objects','workspaces','evidence']},
  'objects_registry': {'path':'governance/state/objects_registry.json','required':['status','objects']},
  'task_registry': {'path':'governance/state/task_registry.json','required':['bem','source_protocol','status','tasks']},
  'rule_registry': {'path':'governance/state/rule_registry.json','required':['status','canonical_term','purpose','rules','conflict_policy']},
  'channel_registry': {'path':'governance/state/channel_registry.json','required':['status','common_managed_channel','external_exchange_rule','internal_channels','message_types','required_ids']},
  'workspace_registry': {'path':'governance/state/workspace_registry.json','required':['status','workspaces','promotion_rule']},
  'product_repository_registry': {'path':'governance/state/product_repository_registry.json','required':['status','purpose','governance','capabilities','repositories']},
  'testing_policy': {'path':'governance/state/testing_policy.json','required':['status','testing_function','default_assignment','workspace','pass_required_for_main_workspace']}
}
Path('governance/state/registry_schemas.json').write_text(json.dumps(schemas, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2), encoding='utf-8')

errors = []
results = []
for name, spec in schemas.items():
    p = Path(spec['path'])
    row = {'registry': name, 'path': spec['path'], 'exists': p.exists(), 'missing_fields': []}
    if not p.exists():
        row['missing_fields'] = spec['required']
        errors.append(name + ': missing file')
    else:
        try:
            data = json.loads(p.read_text(encoding='utf-8'))
            for f in spec['required']:
                if f not in data:
                    row['missing_fields'].append(f)
            if row['missing_fields']:
                errors.append(name + ': missing ' + ','.join(row['missing_fields']))
        except Exception as e:
            row['parse_error'] = str(e)
            errors.append(name + ': parse error')
    results.append(row)
status = 'PASS' if not errors else 'FAIL'
validation = {'bem':'BEM-883','status':status,'schemas_checked':len(schemas),'errors':errors,'results':results}
Path('governance/reports/BEM883_REGISTRY_SCHEMA_VALIDATION.json').write_text(json.dumps(validation, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2), encoding='utf-8')

script = '''# BEM-883 registry validation tool
import json
from pathlib import Path
schemas = json.loads(Path("governance/state/registry_schemas.json").read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
errors = []
for name, spec in schemas.items():
    p = Path(spec["path"])
    if not p.exists():
        errors.append(f"{name}: missing file")
        continue
    data = json.loads(p.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
    for field in spec["required"]:
        if field not in data:
            errors.append(f"{name}: missing {field}")
print("PASS" if not errors else "FAIL")
for err in errors:
    print(err)
raise SystemExit(0 if not errors else 1)
'''
Path('governance/tools/validate_registries.py').write_text(script, encoding='utf-8')

report = '# BEM-883 Registry schema validation\n\nStatus: ' + status + '\n\nSchemas checked: ' + str(len(schemas)) + '\n\nErrors: ' + (', '.join(errors) if errors else 'none') + '\n\nArtifacts:\n- governance/state/registry_schemas.json\n- governance/tools/validate_registries.py\n- governance/reports/BEM883_REGISTRY_SCHEMA_VALIDATION.json\n'
Path('governance/reports/BEM883_REGISTRY_SCHEMA_VALIDATION.md').write_text(report, encoding='utf-8')
marker = Path('governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/BEM883_REGISTRY_SCHEMA_VALIDATION_' + status + '.md')
marker.write_text('# BEM-883 registry schema validation proof\nStatus: ' + status + '\nErrors: ' + (', '.join(errors) if errors else 'none') + '\n', encoding='utf-8')

backlog = Path('governance/backlog/BEM882_EXECUTABLE_BACKLOG.json')
if backlog.exists():
    data = json.loads(backlog.read_text(encoding='utf-8'))
    for item in data.get('items', []):
        if item.get('id') == 'BEM-882-001':
            item['status'] = 'completed'
            item['proof'] = str(marker)
        elif 'status' not in item:
            item['status'] = 'pending'
    backlog.write_text(json.dumps(data, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2), encoding='utf-8')

changed_files.extend(['governance/state/registry_schemas.json','governance/tools/validate_registries.py','governance/reports/BEM883_REGISTRY_SCHEMA_VALIDATION.json','governance/reports/BEM883_REGISTRY_SCHEMA_VALIDATION.md',str(marker),'governance/backlog/BEM882_EXECUTABLE_BACKLOG.json'])
ops_applied.append('BEM883 registry schema validation ' + status)
"""
No issue comments.
